title: Opening for Financial Analyst at HDFC Bank

jsonLd.title: Opening for Financial Analyst at HDFC Bank
jsonLd.description:
HDFC Bank invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Financial Analyst at our Gwalior location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About HDFC Bank:
HDFC Bank is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in IFRS

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Flexible working hours
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Gwalior, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with HDFC Bank!
